title: sophora angulata
intro: Sophora angulata, also known as the "Wedged Sophora" or "Angled Sophora", is a perennial legume native to China, Taiwan, and Japan. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Sophora angulata include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections, and protect against oxidative stress and damage caused by free radicals. Sophora angulata can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which are commonly used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote overall well-being and health.
